steps.title: Find a heavy flying bird
steps.content: The text needs an example showing that not all flying birds weigh less than one kilogram. The table shows the needed example must be capable of flight and have a mass well above one kilogram.

steps.title: Eliminate table mismatches
steps.content: Choice A uses the northern cassowary, which cannot fly. Choice B says the Andean condor is below 10 kg, but the table lists 11.3 kg. Choice C also uses the non-flying northern cassowary. The answer is D.
